rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught mid-spiral, did it anyway — that's a proper round win and honestly one of the cleanest ones yet. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral two weeks running, change room choice made both times — the poncho's still there but the choice underneath it is getting louder. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace stayed home on pool-work mornings — pendant 'reads gay,' ring size, all of it named but still avoided. His people at Lavendra with the full look was the win of the fortnight though — necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers, no armour.
pattern: They're quietest when he's already decided — loudest right at the door, in the change room, on a Tuesday morning before work.
